cards.back: A probabilistic framework used for making predictions or decisions based on new data, updates the probability estimates based on Bayes' rule
The probability of observing the data given a hypothesis or model, often represented as P(X|θ)
The probability of a hypothesis or model before observing new data, often represented as P(θ)
The updated probability of a hypothesis or model after observing new data, often represented as P(θ|X)
A probability statement that describes the probability of an event occurring given that another event has occurred, often represented as P(A|B)
